markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Resolve technical blockers for the Batch 1 redirect feature.](https://fathom.video/share/3kvyn2Db-mkouKLahd6mo15wZzzKFVBr?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Blocker:** The Batch 1 redirect works on the local dev server but fails on the preview server.](https://fathom.video/share/3kvyn2Db-mkouKLahd6mo15wZzzKFVBr?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** A company policy prevents direct deployment access, blocking Israel from debugging server logs.](https://fathom.video/share/3kvyn2Db-mkouKLahd6mo15wZzzKFVBr?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [**Solution:** Matthew will create a direct Slack channel for Israel and Ilya to accelerate communication and unblock the task.](https://fathom.video/share/3kvyn2Db-mkouKLahd6mo15wZzzKFVBr?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)
  - [**Priority:** Completing the Batch 1 redirect is the top KPI for InnoWorld; all other issues are deferred.](https://fathom.video/share/3kvyn2Db-mkouKLahd6mo15wZzzKFVBr?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)

## Topics

### Batch 1 Redirect Blocker

  - [**Goal:** Implement a redirect feature for "Batch 1" paths, managed via Prismic.](https://fathom.video/share/3kvyn2Db-mkouKLahd6mo15wZzzKFVBr?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
  - [**Status:** The feature functions correctly on the local development server.](https://fathom.video/share/3kvyn2Db-mkouKLahd6mo15wZzzKFVBr?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
  - [**Problem:** The redirect fails on the preview server, but the cause is unknown.](https://fathom.video/share/3kvyn2Db-mkouKLahd6mo15wZzzKFVBr?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** A company policy prevents direct deployment access for external partners.](https://fathom.video/share/3kvyn2Db-mkouKLahd6mo15wZzzKFVBr?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [**Impact:** This policy blocks Israel from accessing server logs, preventing debugging.](https://fathom.video/share/3kvyn2Db-mkouKLahd6mo15wZzzKFVBr?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [**Initial Proposal (Rejected):** A live screenshare with Ilya to debug the server together.](https://fathom.video/share/3kvyn2Db-mkouKLahd6mo15wZzzKFVBr?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [**Rationale for Rejection:** Matthew confirmed Ilya is already briefed on the high priority of this task.](https://fathom.video/share/3kvyn2Db-mkouKLahd6mo15wZzzKFVBr?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)

### Solution: Direct Slack Channel

  - [**Decision:** Matthew will create a private Slack channel for Israel and Ilya.](https://fathom.video/share/3kvyn2Db-mkouKLahd6mo15wZzzKFVBr?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This provides a direct communication path, bypassing Matthew as an intermediary and accelerating the debugging process.](https://fathom.video/share/3kvyn2Db-mkouKLahd6mo15wZzzKFVBr?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)
  - [**Scope:** The channel will be dedicated exclusively to completing the Batch 1 redirect.](https://fathom.video/share/3kvyn2Db-mkouKLahd6mo15wZzzKFVBr?tab=summary&timestamp=917.0)

### Other Redirect Issues (Deferred)

  - [**Finding:** Israel discovered other static redirects are misconfigured.](https://fathom.video/share/3kvyn2Db-mkouKLahd6mo15wZzzKFVBr?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
  - [**Example:** The `/consult` path was changed from a permanent (301) to a temporary (302) redirect.](https://fathom.video/share/3kvyn2Db-mkouKLahd6mo15wZzzKFVBr?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)
  - [**Impact:** Users who visited the old path before the change are still cached on the old destination (Calendly) and will not see the new one (HubSpot).](https://fathom.video/share/3kvyn2Db-mkouKLahd6mo15wZzzKFVBr?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
  - [**Decision:** These issues are out of scope for now. The team must focus on the Batch 1 redirect to meet the primary KPI for InnoWorld.](https://fathom.video/share/3kvyn2Db-mkouKLahd6mo15wZzzKFVBr?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Matthew:** Create the private Slack channel for Israel and Ilya.](https://fathom.video/share/3kvyn2Db-mkouKLahd6mo15wZzzKFVBr?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)
  - [**Israel:** Use the new channel to coordinate with Ilya on debugging the Batch 1 redirect.](https://fathom.video/share/3kvyn2Db-mkouKLahd6mo15wZzzKFVBr?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)
  - [**Israel:** Defer other redirect issues until after the Batch 1 task is complete.](https://fathom.video/share/3kvyn2Db-mkouKLahd6mo15wZzzKFVBr?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)
